rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (SpokenStep) and articulates the delta with other ASR evaluation methods.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing citation for 'DIRS' metric.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim ('to our knowledge, DIRS is the first ASR metric...')
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
